hooks.command: FILE=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_input.filePath // empty'); if [ -n "$FILE" ] && echo "$FILE" | grep -q 'social-data.json$'; then echo 'social-data.json modified — run /apg-social:status to check data integrity'; fi

FILE=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_input.filePath // empty'); if [ -n "$FILE" ] && echo "$FILE" | grep -q 'response-queue.json$'; then echo 'response-queue.json modified — run /apg-social:review-queue to check pending drafts'; fi
